default_timeout.description: Default per-call timeout as a Go duration string (e.g. '30s', '2m'). Applied when no per_tool override matches.

per_tool.description: Per-tool overrides keyed by tool name. Values are Go duration strings. Keys may be exact names ('web_fetch') or glob patterns matched via path.Match ('mcp.*'). Resolution: exact key wins; among glob matches the longest pattern wins; otherwise default_timeout applies.
